name: aip-go-pro
description: AIP Go Pro – Professional Management UI

scripts.daemon:copy:linux: mkdir -p resources/bin/linux && cp ../aip-go-services/build/bin/aip-daemon resources/bin/linux/aip-daemon && chmod +x resources/bin/linux/aip-daemon
scripts.daemon:copy:win: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path resources/bin/windows | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Force ../aip-go-services/build/bin/aip-daemon.exe resources/bin/windows/aip-daemon.exe"
scripts.daemon:install:linux: npm run daemon:build && npm run daemon:copy:linux
